chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 830 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6082/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6083/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6084/2025 (R/Surety) 30.10.2025 Mr. Waseem Ahmed Sundrani, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by applicant Zeeshan Ali seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that Muhammad Azam Samejo, who on 10.09.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing three original defence savings certificate, total amounting to Rs.30,000/-, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 16.09.2025 which has confirmed, as is evident from order dated 22.09.2025 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
